question: How likely is the farm bill to pass with the save our bacon act provision?
textDescription: In the next month, will the farm bill will pass with the save our bacon act provision?  Passing refers to becoming law, not just getting through the house.
newsShortReason: Senate's bipartisan opposition to the Save Our Bacon Act suggests it may be removed from the Farm Bill.
newsKeyEvidence: Senate Democrats and Republicans have expressed concerns over the Save Our Bacon Act. | Senate Agriculture Committee Chairman John Boozman stated he doesn't expect the provision to survive the Senate. | A group of senators, including Cory Booker and Amy Klobuchar, have signaled their unwillingness to vote for any such measures in the Farm Bill.
